question: Which of the following is shown directly on each task tile in the Tasklist Tasks queue preview?

options.text: The full BPMN XML of the user task element.
The hostname of the worker that last polled the job.
The Zeebe partition ID that owns the process instance.

a.text: The docs list the attributes shown on each queue tile and Due date is one of them, alongside task name, process name, optional context description, assignee, priority, creation date, and follow-up date.

b.text: BPMN XML is a Modeler/deployment artefact and is not surfaced on the Tasks queue tile.

c.text: Worker hostnames are an integration concern and do not appear on the queue tile.

d.text: Zeebe partition IDs are an internal broker detail not exposed in the Tasklist queue preview.

explanation: The Tasks queue tile previews a fixed set of attributes: task name, process name, optional context description, assignee, priority, creation date, due date, and follow-up date. Internal infrastructure details such as BPMN XML, worker hostnames, or Zeebe partition IDs are not part of this preview.
